# PERF-242 positive: per-iteration make([]byte, len*N)
lang: go
file: PERF-242-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func EncodeAll(items []string) [][]byte {
	out := make([][]byte, 0, len(items))
	for _, text := range items {
		buf := make([]byte, 0, len(text)*4+2)
		buf = append(buf, text...)
		out = append(out, buf)
	}
	return out
}
